title: Ilhan Omar Condemns Guest’s Arrest at Trump’s State of the Union
author: Chris Cameron and Michael Gold
fullText: Aliya Rahman, a U.S. citizen who was dragged from her vehicle after an ICE agent shattered its window, was charged with unlawful conduct after standing up during President Trump’s speech.
summary: Aliya Rahman, a U.S. citizen who was dragged from her vehicle after an ICE agent shattered its window, was charged with unlawful conduct after standing up during President Trump’s speech.
